# Resource: proxmox_notifications_endpoint_webhook

Manages a webhook notification endpoint.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `method` (String) HTTP method to use. One of `post`, `put`, `get`.
- `name` (String) The unique name of the webhook endpoint.
- `url` (String) The webhook server URL.

### Optional

- `body` (String) HTTP body template. Stored as plain text, base64-encoded when sent to the API.
- `comment` (String) Comment.
- `disable` (Boolean) Disable this endpoint. Defaults to `false`.
- `header` (Attributes List) List of HTTP headers to set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--header))
- `secret` (Attributes List) List of secrets available as template variables. Values are write-only and will not be read back from the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--secret))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--header"></a>
### Nested Schema for `header`

Required:

- `name` (String) Header name.
- `value` (String) Header value.


<a id="nestedatt--secret"></a>
### Nested Schema for `secret`

Required:

- `name` (String) Secret name.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Secret value. This value is write-only.
